label: biology
description: scientific study of living things, especially their structure, function, growth, evolution, and distribution

label: human
description: any single member of Homo sapiens, unique extant species of the genus Homo

label: health
description: desirable level of functional or metabolic efficiency of a living being

label: death
description: permanent cessation of vital functions

label: life
description: matter capable of extracting energy from the environment for replication

label: ecology
description: scientific study of the relationships between living organisms

label: botany
description: science of plant life

label: cell
description: basic structural and functional unit of all organisms

label: suicide
description: intentional act of causing one's own death

label: head
description: anterior anatomical region in many animals, which tends to contain sensory and nervous organs and orifices for ingestion and breathing

label: Avicenna
description: Persian polymath, physician and philosopher (c. 980–1037)

label: hand
description: extremity at the end of an arm or forelimb

label: abortion
description: intentional ending of a pregnancy

label: lung
description: essential respiration organ in many air-breathing animals

label: bone
description: rigid organ that constitutes part of the endoskeleton of vertebrates

label: mouth
description: body cavity and the parts surrounding it

label: human pregnancy
description: time of human offspring development in mother's body

label: Arthur Conan Doyle
description: British writer and physician (1859–1930)

label: skin
description: soft outer covering organ of vertebrates

label: tongue
description: mobile organ located inside the mouth

label: sleep
description: naturally recurring resting state of mind and body

label: leaf
description: main organ of photosynthesis and transpiration in higher plants, usually consisting of a flat green blade attached to the stem directly or by a stalk

label: zoology
description: scientific study of animals

label: egg
description: organic vessel in which an embryo first begins to develop

label: bee
description: clade of hymenopteran insects

label: female breast
description: one of two prominences located on the region of the torso of a female primate, containing the mammary gland

label: organism
description: any individual living being or physical living system

label: Hippocrates
description: Greek physician (c. 460 – c. 370 BC)

label: monkey
description: common idea of an animal of the "higher primates" (the simians in English excluding apes)

label: photosynthesis
description: biological process to convert light into chemical energy

label: muscle
description: contractile soft tissue of animals

label: species
description: one of the basic units of biological classification and a taxonomic rank

label: tobacco
description: agricultural product processed from the leaves of plants in genus nicotiana

label: orange
description: citrus fruit of the orange tree

label: biochemistry
description: study of chemical processes in living organisms

label: butterfly
description: group of insects in the order Lepidoptera

label: vagina
description: part of the female genital tract

label: penis
description: primary sexual organ of male animals

label: face
description: part of the body at the front of the head

label: duck
description: common name for many species in the bird family Anatidae

label: Sun Yat-sen
description: Chinese politician, physician, and revolutionary (1866–1925)

label: sex
description: biological system that determines an individual's sexually reproductive functions

label: carbohydrate
description: organic compound that consists only of carbon, hydrogen, and oxygen

label: carrot
description: root vegetable, plant of the Apiaceae family

label: mango
description: fruit of the mango tree

label: skeleton
description: part of a body that forms the supporting structure

label: Angiosperms
description: clade of seed plants that produce flowers

label: pneumonia
description: inflammation of the alveoli of the lungs

label: seed
description: embryonic plant enclosed in a protective outer covering (seed coat)

label: hormone
description: chemical released by a cell or a gland in one part of the body that sends out messages that affect cells in other parts of the organism

label: fox
description: small to medium-sized omnivorous mammal belonging to the family Canidae

label: Nail (anatomy)
description: hard projection of digit

label: organ
description: collection of tissues with similar functions

label: algae
description: group of organisms which mostly grow in water and can perform oxygenic photosynthesis

label: human body
description: entire structure of a human organism

label: physiology
description: science regarding function of organisms or living systems

label: Galen
description: 1st-century Greek physician, surgeon and philosopher

label: vertebral column
description: bony structure found in vertebrates

label: alcoholism
description: loss of control over the quantity of consumed alcohol

label: abdomen
description: in humans, region of the body between the thorax at the top and the pelvis at the bottom; in insects, segment at the caudal end of the body, following on from the head and thorax

label: nut
description: in botany, type of dry indehiscent fruit

label: poison
description: substance that causes death, injury or harm to organs

label: dolphin
description: marine mammals, closely related to whales and porpoises

label: breathing
description: process that moves air in and out of the lungs

label: microbiology
description: study of microscopic organisms

label: skull
description: bony or cartilaginous structure that forms the skeleton of head in vertebrates

label: pumpkin
description: orange (yellow, green) winter squash native to North America

label: chili pepper
description: fruit of plants from the genus Capsicum, members of the nightshade family, Solanaceae

label: kangaroo
description: common name for some marsupials indigenous to Australia in the family Macropodidae

label: Mammuthus
description: extinct genus of elephants (Elephantidae)

label: eye
description: organ that detects light and converts it into electro-chemical impulses in neurons

label: brain
description: organ that serves as the center of the nervous system in all vertebrate and most invertebrate animals

label: nervous system
description: part of an animal that coordinates actions and senses

label: Alzheimer's disease
description: progressive, neurodegenerative disease characterized by memory loss

label: stroke
description: death of a region of brain cells due to poor blood flow

label: mental disorder
description: distressing thought or behavior pattern

label: autism
description: neurodevelopmental condition

label: psychiatry
description: branch of medicine devoted to the study, diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of mental disorders

label: intelligence
description: mental faculty

label: neuron
description: electrically excitable cell that communicates via synapses

label: meningitis
description: inflammation of the membranes around the brain and spinal cord

label: dementia
description: long-term brain disorder causing personality changes and impaired memory, reasoning, and social function

label: pedophilia
description: psychiatric and paraphilic disorder characterized by a sexual attraction to prepubescent children

label: sensory nervous system
description: part of the nervous system responsible for processing sensory information

label: neurology
description: medical specialty dealing with disorders of the nervous system

label: bipolar disorder
description: mental illness characterized by mood changes

label: central nervous system
description: main information-processing organs of the nervous system, consisting of the brain, spinal cord, and meninges

label: stress
description: organism's response to a stressor such as an environmental condition or a stimulus

label: attention deficit hyperactivity disorder
description: neurodevelopmental disorder

label: cerebellum
description: region of the brain connected to the brainstem that coordinates motor functions and muscle tone, helping an animal's need to track moving objects, its own movements, and to analyse the sensory consequences of movements in order to control movements

label: coma
description: state of unconsciousness

label: neuroscience
description: scientific study of the nervous system

label: mental health
description: level of psychological well-being

label: post-traumatic stress disorder
description: mental disorder that developed after experiencing or witnessing a terrifying or life-threatening event

label: habitat
description: ecological or environmental area inhabited by a particular species; natural environment in which an organism lives, or the physical environment that surrounds a species population

label: neurosis
description: term and disease in psychology

label: encephalitis
description: acute inflammation of the brain with flu-like symptoms

label: cerebrum
description: large part of the brain containing the cerebral cortex

label: brain tumor
description: neoplasm in the brain

label: intellectual disability
description: generalized neurodevelopmental disorder

label: peripheral nervous system
description: part of the nervous system

label: ecological niche
description: fit of a species living under specific environmental conditions.

label: human brain
description: main organ of the human nervous system

label: nervous tissue
description: main component of the nervous system

label: developmental biology
description: discipline that explores the processes by which individual organisms grow and develop (ontogeny)

label: brain stem
description: posterior part of the brain, adjoining and structurally continuous

label: cerebral cortex
description: outer layer of neural tissue of the cerebrum of the brain

label: ganglion

label: somatosensory system
description: complex system of sensory neurons and pathways that responds to changes at the surface or inside the body

label: psychiatric hospital
description: hospital treating serious mental disorders

label: stimulant
description: drug that increases the activity of the central nervous system

label: concussion
description: type of traumatic brain injury

label: persistent vegetative state
description: disorder of consciousness caused by severe brain damage

label: brain damage
description: destruction or degeneration of brain cells

label: recreational drug use
description: use of a drug with the primary intention to alter the state of consciousness

label: thyme
description: herb with culinary, medicinal and ornamental uses

label: medicine
description: field of study for diagnosing, treating and preventing disease

label: COVID-19
description: contagious disease caused by SARS-CoV-2

label: disease
description: abnormal condition negatively affecting organisms

label: HIV/AIDS
description: spectrum of conditions caused by HIV infection

label: cancer
description: group of diseases involving abnormal cell growth and spread

label: malaria
description: mosquito-borne infectious disease

label: tuberculosis
description: infectious disease caused by the bacterium Mycobacterium tuberculosis

label: medication
description: substance used to diagnose, cure, treat, or prevent disease

label: influenza
description: infectious disease caused by an influenza virus

label: cholera
description: bacterial infection of the small intestine

label: rabies
description: deadly viral disease, transmitted through animals

label: Ebola hemorrhagic fever
description: human disease

label: common cold
description: common viral infection of upper respiratory tract

label: leprosy

label: measles
description: viral disease affecting humans

label: smallpox
description: eradicated human disease

description: substance used to stimulate the production of antibodies and provide immunity against one or several diseases, agent of a disease, its products, or a synthetic substitute

label: antibiotic
description: drug used in the treatment and prevention of bacterial infections

label: epilepsy
description: human neurological disease causing seizures

label: sexually transmitted infection
description: infection transmitted through human sexual behavior

label: asthma
description: long-term disease involving inflamed airways

label: immune system
description: biological system

label: allergy
description: immune system response to a substance that most people tolerate well

label: poliomyelitis
description: human disease

label: syphilis
description: sexually transmitted infection

label: chickenpox
description: human disease

label: HIV
description: human retrovirus, cause of AIDS

label: aspirin
description: medication used to treat pain and decrease the risk of heart disease

label: dengue fever
description: tropical disease caused by the dengue virus, transmitted by mosquito

label: vaccination
description: administration of a vaccine to protect against disease

label: breast cancer
description: cancer that originates in the mammary gland

label: domain
description: taxonomic rank (for "ordinary" organisms thus not viruses)

label: infection

description: group of cancers that usually begin in the bone marrow

label: pertussis

label: lung cancer
description: cancer in the lung

label: blood type

label: gonorrhea

label: scabies
description: human disease

label: inflammation
description: signs of activation of the immune system

label: mumps

description: branch of medicine dealing with cancer

label: immunology
description: branch of medicine studying the immune system

label: dermatology
description: branch of medicine dealing with the skin, its structure, functions, and diseases

label: epidemiology

label: dental caries

label: veterinary medicine
description: medical speciality dealing with the diseases of animals, animal welfare, etc.

label: arthritis

description: Jewish-American inventor of polio vaccine (1914–1995)

label: yellow fever

description: the branch of medicine that focuses on surgical and medical diseases of the urinary system and the reproductive organs

label: health care
description: prevention of disease and promotion of wellbeing of humans and animals

label: hematology

label: prostate cancer

label: scarlet fever
description: human disease

description: infection caused by the human papillomavirus (HPV)

label: cardiovascular disease

label: herpes simplex
description: viral disease caused by the herpes simplex virus

label: heart

label: blood

description: part of the digestive tract, following the stomach and followed by the large intestine fake

description: type of unpleasant feeling

description: spore-bearing fruiting body of a fungus

description: sensory perception of sound by living organisms

label: arm
description: forearm and upper arm together without hand and shoulder

label: analgesic

description: series of tests assessing vision and pertaining to the eyes

description: science of genes, heredity, and variation in living organisms

description: erectile organ with internal and external anatomy, part of the vulva

description: study of the internal structure of plants

description: family of large biological molecules

description: organism of the male sex

description: organism of the female sex
